title: parietaria lusitanica var. micrantha
intro: Parietaria lusitanica var. micrantha, commonly known as the small-leaved pellitory, is a plant species within the nettle family (Urticaceae) that is native to Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Parietaria lusitanica var. micrantha include relief from ear infections, headaches, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
